summary.intent: The user wanted a homepage footer added with the text "Powered by Entire" and wanted an explanation of the files changed.
summary.outcome: A semantic footer was added to the homepage markup and styled to match the static site's existing visual treatment. The assistant reported that only index.html and styles.css changed, with no JavaScript changes needed.

repo: The project is a small static site with index.html, styles.css, and script.js.
Homepage markup lives in index.html, while page-level styling lives in styles.css.

code.finding: Added <footer class="site-footer">Powered by Entire</footer> below the main homepage content.
Added .site-footer styling for spacing, centered text, light color, and subtle glow.

workflow: Inspected the app structure before editing.
Checked git diff and git status after the patch to summarize the exact changes.

friction: rg was not installed, so file inspection fell back to PowerShell reads.
